title: Chaos
description:
Chaos is an online FPS game. 
Why should you play it? 
Destruction, lots of it, plus some explosions, oh yeah, guns! 
Who doesn't like guns and explosions? 
that's what Chaos is all about...

Official Discord: 

The main features of Chaos are:
• Fight AI In The New Arena Mode!

• Sliding

• Wall Jumping

• Ground Slam

• Dynamic Crosshair System

• (Almost) Fully Destructible Environments

• Grenade to Blow Holes In Walls, And To Push The Player

• Fast-Paced Gameplay

• Lots Of Weapons 
 M4A1
 AKM
 SMLE MKIII
 MP5
 Semi-Auto Shotgun
 Sniper
 Rocket Launcher
 Kriss Vector
 Hush Puppy
 M249
 Katana
 Grenade Launcher
 More To Come...

• Lots Of Modes
 Free For All
 Team Deathmatch
 Free For All Permadeath (200% HP)

• Lots Of Maps With Unique Twists
 Space
 Lava
 Floating Missiles

• Accurate Linetrace Based Gunplay

• Built From Trusted Feedback
description_short: Chaos is an online FPS game. Why should you play it? Destruction, lots of it, plus some explosions, oh yeah, guns! Who doesn't like guns and explosions?
